name: hsc-exam-system
description: HSC Exam Form System - Backend API + Angular Frontend

scripts.build:backend: cd backend && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('node_modules', {recursive: true, force: true})" && npm cache clean --force && npm install --production=false && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend:local: cd frontend && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('node_modules', {recursive: true, force: true})" && npm cache clean --force && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --production=false && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ..
